title: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: HEALTH SERVICE BUILDING SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers individual and group counseling for people who want to change their relationship to substance use. Services may also include drug and alcohol assessments, drug screening, and case management. Peer support and recovery mentors are available, along with referrals to mental health and community resources. Also supports parent–child reunification, provides Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT), helps with admissions to detox and residential treatment, and creates relapse prevention plans to support long-term recovery. 530 NW 27th Street Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday -Friday 8am-5pm (541) 766-6767 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 766-6767 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Proof of insurance if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton County Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Case/Care Management * Substance Use Disorder Issues Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention Medication Assisted Maintenance Treatment for Substance Use Disorders Peer Counseling * Substance Use Disorder Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Substance Use Disorder Issues Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - ADULT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HEALTH SERVICE BUILDING
